description: The organism's DNA record. Complete chain of custody from Day 1 to present.

evolutionary_arc.event: EPOS concept crystallized — first modules built
capabilities_gained: Agent role system (Alpha, Sigma, Omega, Orchestrator, Friday, TTLG)
architectural_decisions: LangGraph as canonical state machine
File-based JSONL event bus
Constitutional governance as structural constraint (not policy)

evolutionary_arc.event: CCP sovereignty certified — 105/105 + Custom Props Framework
architectural_decisions: CCP as universal cognitive layer
4 concentric rings: raw input → classification → routing → action
Sovereignty score: 85+ = marketplace ready
Doctor check as institutional health monitor
70b reasoning + 8b fast path split at 500-token threshold

evolutionary_arc.event: Execution arms deployed — full autonomous operation begins
capabilities_gained: Content Lab (ERI predictor, brief generator, template engine, CRS, marketing reactor)
AAR constitutional amendment (every session, no exceptions)
architectural_decisions: A file is not a feature — nothing done until it runs
AAR is constitutional mandate, not optional
Pre-mortem: check imports, paths, permissions before first line of code
Event chain: spark.created → ERI predicted → script generated → validated → published → echo scored

evolutionary_arc.event: LLM path wiring — Claude Code CLI routing through LiteLLM
capabilities_gained: LiteLLM proxy routing for Claude Code CLI
architectural_decisions: Route all LLM calls through LiteLLM proxy
ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://litellm:4000 inside containers

capabilities_gained: 14-service Docker compose (epos-core, friday, litellm, daemon, governance-gate, etc.)
All 577 vault files accessible in containers
Zero Windows paths in container code
architectural_decisions: python:3.11-slim base image
File-based event bus via shared Docker volume (no network ports)
LiteLLM as unified routing proxy
Context vault mounted at /app/context_vault
docker cp deployment — no source bind mount
disable_spend_logs: true fixes LiteLLM 400 on startup

evolutionary_arc.event: Friday Chief of Staff — 18/18 execution arms verified
capabilities_gained: Friday identity (6 archetypes: Chief of Staff, Analyst, Navigator, Trainer, Advisor, Operator)
5 daily anchors (morning briefing, flywheel, KIL, afternoon, evening close)
architectural_decisions: Friday = personality layer, CCP = comprehension layer, voice = communication layer
Daily anchor schedule: 6AM–23:30 with 5 Friday-specific touch points
Upskill engine feeds nightly QLoRA training queue

evolutionary_arc.event: Intelligence layer diagnostic — Groq TPM limit confirmed
capabilities_gained: WSL2 Claude Code TPM limit root-cause identified (72k vs 12k)
architectural_decisions: Groq free tier: 12k TPM hard ceiling — cannot run Claude Code CLI through it
Self-sufficiency sprint triggered by this constraint
SCC as solution: remove Anthropic/Groq dependency for coding

evolutionary_arc.event: SCC seated — organism begins building itself
capabilities_gained: AAR auto-generation on every session close
architectural_decisions: SCC replaces Desktop CODE for constitutional coding
Desktop CODE continues as bootstrap tool until SCC shadow-tests at 90%
Organism builds itself — nightly QLoRA on every AAR
TOOL: protocol for model → tool execution
Lazy imports: nodes boot even if dependencies absent
Constitutional system prompt embeds EPOS Constitution v3.1
Internal secrets auto-generated by EPOS (rotatable)
External secrets human-gated (Jamie must supply)
8/8 binary verifier as sanitation gate before any cloud push
BOM strip as standard Doctor check for Windows-origin files
Directive ID in every file header created during session

evolutionary_arc.event: Evolutionary archive created — full chain of custody documented
capabilities_gained: AAR_CATALOG.json (24 AARs cataloged with retroactive IDs)
Organism state snapshots with SHA-256 checksums
State recovery from event bus replay
architectural_decisions: Every directive pairs with exactly one AAR
AAR stored in 3 locations: vault + Attachments + Drive
State graph snapshots retained for 30 cycles
SHA-256 checksum validates state integrity on every load
Recovery from event bus replay if all snapshots lost

capability_timeline.notes: Snapshot values at each date milestone. 'current' = latest known.

architectural_decisions_ledger.rationale: No ports, no network, survives restarts, human-readable

architectural_decisions_ledger.decision: A file is not a feature — nothing done until it runs
architectural_decisions_ledger.rationale: Prevent incomplete work from entering the organism
Institutional memory, QLoRA training data, causal chain

architectural_decisions_ledger.decision: Context vault as single source of truth
architectural_decisions_ledger.rationale: All agents read/write the same vault, no parallel state
Model-agnostic, swap providers without code changes

architectural_decisions_ledger.decision: Lazy imports for all EPOS nodes
architectural_decisions_ledger.rationale: Any node must boot even if dependencies are not yet seated

architectural_decisions_ledger.decision: Internal secrets auto-generated, external secrets human-gated
architectural_decisions_ledger.rationale: EPOS can rotate its own secrets, cannot invent external API keys

architectural_decisions_ledger.decision: Directive ID in every file header
architectural_decisions_ledger.rationale: Any file can be traced to the session that created it

market_evaluation_hooks.description: Triggers that should update this archive and inform next build decisions
hooks: Echolocation score shift >10% on a topic — update content_lab.echolocation_score in state graph
FOTW captures a recurring customer objection — log as gap, evaluate node for next directive
Competitor launches overlapping feature — evaluate defensive positioning, update roadmap
Model benchmark exceeded by newer release — queue model swap in registry
Constitutional rule causes repeated friction — submit amendment proposal via governance gate
Client requests capability EPOS lacks — log in pm_surface.jsonl as dependency type
SCC shadow match rate drops below 0.9 — pause retirement, investigate divergence
Event bus exceeds 10k events — evaluate rotation/archival policy
